tools.name: directions.getDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points

tools.name: directions.getOptimalDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize distance/time

tools.name: directions.getTruckDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points for a commercial vehicle

tools.name: directions.getTruckOptimalDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize distance/time for a commercial vehicle.

tools.name: directions.postDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points

tools.name: directions.postOptimalDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between a start point and one or more end points which are reordered to minimize distance or time.

tools.name: directions.postTruckDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between given start and end points

tools.name: directions.postTruckOptimalDirectionsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the turn-by-turn directions, geometry, distance, and time of the shortest path or fastest path between a start point and one or more end points which are reordered to minimize distance or time.

tools.name: distance.getDistanceBetweenPairsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.

tools.name: distance.getDistanceOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: distance.getTruckDistanceBetweenPairsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints for a commercial vehicle. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.

tools.name: distance.getTruckDistanceOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: distance.postDistanceBetweenPairsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.

tools.name: distance.postDistanceOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: distance.postTruckDistanceBetweenPairsOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest paths between all pairs of fromPoints and toPoints. The number of fromPoints times the number of toPoints should not exceed 100 or the request will time out.

tools.name: distance.postTruckDistanceOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the distance and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: route.getOptimalRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize distance or time

tools.name: route.getRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: route.getTruckOptimalRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize distance or time for a commercial vehicle.

tools.name: route.getTruckRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points for a commercial vehicle.

tools.name: route.postOptimalRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize total distance or time.

tools.name: route.postRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.

tools.name: route.postTruckOptimalRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between a start point and a series of end points which are reordered to minimize total distance or time.

tools.name: route.postTruckRouteOutputFormat
tools.description: Represents the geometry, distance, and time of the shortest or fastest path between given start and end points.
